leadText: Not to be confused with the Ability Protean. The Protein (Japanese: タウリン Taurine) is a type of vitamin introduced in Generation I. It increases the Attack of a Pokémon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation I to II 1.2 Generation III to VII 1.3 Generation VIII onward Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation I to II [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, adds 2560 Attack Stat Experience to the target Pokémon per use, until it has 25600 Attack Stat Experience. In Generation II , it also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. The Protein is consumed upon use and cannot be used in battle. Generation III to VII [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, adds 10 Attack EVs to the target Pokémon per use, until it has 100 Attack EVs. It also increases the Pokémon's friendship a little. The Protein is consumed upon use and cannot be used in battle. Generation VIII onward [ edit | edit source ] Protein can now be used even on a Pokémon that has 100 Attack EVs or more, allowing the Attack EVs to be raised to the single-stat cap of 252 or the total cap of 510 this way.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] A consumable item that raises the Attack of Pokémon that ingests it by 3 and restores 5 Belly for it. If thrown, it will grant the same effect as if it was consumed by the Pokémon it hits (it cannot be caught); if it is sticky , it will also deal 2 damage. Protein can be blended into a drink at Spinda's Juice Bar , although it has no special effects.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Increases the Attack power of the selected Pok é mon . G S C Raises Attack of one Pok é mon . R S Colo Raises the stat Attack of one Pok é mon . FR LG A nutritious drink for Pok é mon . It raises the base Attack stat of one Pok é mon . E XD Raises the base Attack stat of one Pok é mon . D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Attack stat of a single Pokémon. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E A nutritious drink for Pokémon. When consumed, it raises the base Attack stat of a single Pokémon. Sw Sh BD SP LA A nutritious drink for Pokémon. When consumed, it raises the Attack base points of a single Pokémon. S V A nutritious drink for Pokémon. This drink increases base points for a Pokémon's Attack stat.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B A drink that boosts the Pokémon's Attack. It also slightly fills the Pokémon's Belly. MD T D S A drink that permanently raises the Pokémon's Attack. It also slightly fills the Pokémon's Belly. MD GtI Drink it to raise your Attack. S MD Drinking it raises your Attack. The effect lasts even after this adventure.
